title: Tender Garlic Indian Crumble
description: A tender garlic Indian crumble dish featuring peppers and baked to perfection in one pot, suitable for raw-friendly eating.
instructions: Heat ghee or vegan butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and cook until softened and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Add bell pepper, cumin, coriander, turmeric powder, and salt. Mix well.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until peppers are tender but slightly crisp.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish.
Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (205°C) for about 15-20 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking.
Serve warm with naan bread or other accompaniments.
